category: 商业生产级信息图-行业垂直-教育
source: G7 Track G 演化结晶 - 教育培训行业垂直融合

color_palette.description: 教育温暖多彩体系: 蓝#2196F3(数学) + 黄#FFC107(语言) + 绿#4CAF50(科学) + 红#E91E63(艺术), 学科色彩编码

typography.description: LXGW WenKai手写体(主) + Microsoft YaHei(辅), 手写风格亲和力, 6级字号层次

layout.card_style: hand-drawn rounded rectangle, sketchy outlines, marker texture
layout.description: 教育融合布局: 放射(学科中心)+树状(知识点), 手绘白板风格, 学科色彩编码, 亲和力

visual_frequency.HF: 学科核心 + 手绘图标 + 主色强调 (前1/3画面)
visual_frequency.MF: 知识点 + 教学内容 + 中性色支撑 (中段叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 练习题 + 注释 + 浅色背景 (底部收束)
visual_frequency.progression: 学科中心(放射)→知识点(树状), 学科色彩编码(蓝数学/黄语言/绿科学/红艺术)

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 学生·教师·需要亲和力知识呈现
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 教育知识可视化, 需符合教育场景, 手绘亲和, 色彩温暖

reader_constraint.reader_state: 学习者·需要友好易懂的知识呈现
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 学习模式(知识吸收+笔记)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 手绘白板风格 + 学科色彩编码 + 亲和力 + 知识点清晰

prompt_keywords: educational knowledge map, hand-drawn whiteboard style, sketchy outlines, marker texture, doodle icons, sticky notes, friendly approachable, subject color coding, LXGW WenKai handwritten typography, playful yet structured
negative_keywords: 3D render, shadows, gradients, photorealistic, dark background, formal, rigid, corporate, scary
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 教育知识手绘融合图
✅ 必须: 手绘白板风格 + 学科色彩编码(蓝数学/黄语言/绿科学/红艺术) + LXGW WenKai手写体 + 放射+树状融合布局 + 亲和力
❌ 禁止: 3D渲染 + 阴影 + 渐变 + 严肃商务 + 暗色背景 + 写实照片
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Educational hand-drawn whiteboard style ONLY. Sketchy outlines with marker texture. Subject color coding (blue=math, yellow=language, green=science, red=art). LXGW WenKai handwritten typography. Radial + tree fusion layout. NO 3D, NO formal corporate, NO dark background.
meta_prompt: educational knowledge map, hand-drawn whiteboard aesthetic, sketchy rounded rectangle outlines, marker texture, doodle icons, sticky notes, radial center (subject) + tree branches (topics), subject color coding blue #2196F3 yellow #FFC107 green #4CAF50 red #E91E63, LXGW WenKai handwritten typography, friendly approachable, playful yet structured
prompt_example: Education knowledge sketch fusion map, hand-drawn whiteboard aesthetic, radial center (subject) + tree branches (topics), sketchy rounded rectangle outlines with marker texture, doodle icons, sticky notes accents, subject color coding (blue #2196F3 math, yellow #FFC107 language, green #4CAF50 science, red #E91E63 art), LXGW WenKai handwritten typography (subject title 20pt, topic 14pt, detail 11pt), whiteboard #FAFAFA background, friendly approachable feel. --ar 4:3 --s 300 --style raw --industry education --fusion sketch --tool edrawmax
reference_source: G7 Track G演化结晶 - 万兴市场教育培训分类对齐, 适配学校/培训/在线教育场景
